title: Base Memecoin Screener
body: Live feed of new token launches on Base — subscribes to new Aerodrome/Uniswap pairs, shows real-time price candles and momentum for meme coin hunters.

title: DeFi Wallet Dashboard
body: Complete DeFi overview for any wallet — current token positions with USD values, 30-day portfolio performance curve, and recent swap activity in one dashboard.

title: DEX Trade History
body: Pull all DEX swap events and volume for any wallet address or token pair.

title: Jupiter Swap Route Finder
body: Query Jupiter's on-chain routing data indexed by GoldRush to find the best swap path for any SPL token pair — returns the expected output amount, minimum output after slippage tolerance, price impact percentage, and the full multi-hop route through intermediate DEXes (Raydium, Orca, Meteora, Lifinity, etc.). Feed this into an agent's trade execution loop: if price impact exceeds your threshold, hold the position; otherwise use the route data to construct and submit the swap transaction.

title: Live DEX Pair Stream
body: Subscribe to new DEX pair creations as they happen across chains — catch launches the moment liquidity is added.

title: Raydium Pool Analytics
body: Fetch Raydium AMM and CLMM (Concentrated Liquidity) pool data via GoldRush for any pool address or token pair — returns current TVL in USD, 24h trading volume, real-time fee APY, token0/token1 reserve amounts, and current spot price. Use to compare pools before providing liquidity, track impermanent loss on an existing position by comparing entry vs current reserves, or build a Raydium pool leaderboard sorted by fee APY or volume.

title: Solana DEX Trade History
body: Decode all swap transactions for any Solana wallet via GoldRush's transaction decoder on `solana-mainnet` — automatically identifies and extracts trades from Jupiter, Raydium, Orca, and Meteora instructions. Each decoded trade returns: input token + amount, output token + amount, USD value at trade time, DEX used, and tx signature. Returns a clean trade-by-trade list with zero raw instruction parsing. Build a full Solana trading journal, PnL calculator, or strategy performance analyzer.

title: Solana Yield Dashboard
body: Aggregate current APY/APR data across the top Solana yield venues using GoldRush: Marinade Finance (native staking 6–7% + liquid mSOL), Orca (CLMM fee APY by pool), Kamino (lending supply/borrow rates), Drift (perpetuals funding rates), and Jito (MEV-boosted staking). Returns a unified yield comparison object sortable by APY, protocol, or risk level — use as the data backbone for an autonomous yield-rebalancing agent or a user-facing 'where should I put my SOL?' comparison UI.

title: Token Launch Screener
body: Real-time screener for new DEX token launches — filter by minimum liquidity, chain, and pair token. Build a Dexscreener-style new pairs feed.
